title: Commercial Executive (Marine, Shipyard)
description:
Job Description:

  • Coordinate with clients and brokers to identify and pursue new business opportunities.
  • Receive and review enquiries and tender documents, analyzing specifications to prepare cost estimates based on standard cost breakdown structures.
  • Prepare and issue RFPs/RFQs to equipment and material suppliers, and coordinate technical and commercial clarifications when necessary.
  • Evaluate vendor quotations to ensure compliance with tender and specification requirements while achieving competitive pricing.
  • Compile foreign exchange, material, and labor costs to support accurate cost estimation.
  • Prepare detailed cost breakdowns for internal review, approval, and timely submission.
  • Identify critical equipment and systems and conduct basic risk assessments.
  • Coordinate with internal stakeholders to compile all required tender documentation, ensuring full compliance with tender requirements and timely, high-quality submissions.
  • Support tender evaluations and prepare cash flow projections when required.
  • Assist in contract discussions and negotiations as needed.
  • Provide support in the procurement of equipment and related contracts.
  • Administer equipment contracts, including monitoring delivery schedules and milestone payment progress.
  • Build and maintain strong working relationships with clients, brokers, and suppliers.
  • Collaborate with stakeholders to ensure timely and accurate delivery of equipment.

Requirements:

  • Diploma/Degree in business, engineering or any related fields.
  • Minimum 3 years of working experience in Marine/ Shipyard industry.
  • Excellent communication and presentation skills

Interested applicants for the above advertised position(s), please kindly email an updated copy of your resume to: gs1@talenttradersg.com;


EA License No.: 13C6305

Registration No.: R23117856 CHOE KIN MUN


For candidate who applied for the advertised position is deemed to have consented to us that we may collect, use or disclose your personal information for purpose in connection with the services provided by us.

postedCompany.description:
TALENT TRADER GROUP PTE. LTD.

Talent Trader is steered by young, dynamic professionals; each of them bringing their own vast experiences from leading Banks and HR Agencies.


We provide efficient talent sourcing, recruitment and retention services that help companies acquire effective Mid-management talent.


We offer the following value-added services for a variety of Mid-management positions across industry veticals such as Banking, Marine, Offshore, Retail, IT, F&B, Education, Manufacturing and Others:


- Talent Sourcing and Recruitment

- International Recruitment

- Contract & Temporary Staffing

- Payroll Services

- Employment Passes
